name: Infor CloudSuite ERP API
what_it_does: Infor CloudSuite industry-specific ERP REST API for manufacturing, healthcare, distribution, and hospitality enterprise operations. Enables AI agents to manage production and shop floor operations for manufacturing automation, handle supply chain management and demand planning for distribution optimization, access healthcare supply chain and clinical materials management for health system operations, retrieve financial management and multi-entity consolidation for enterprise financial reporting, manage human capital management and workforce scheduling for industry-specific HR operations, handle hospitality operations and property management for hotel and F&B enterprise management, access warehouse management and distribution for order fulfillment automation, retrieve fashion and retail lifecycle management for apparel industry operations, manage aerospace and defense manufacturing compliance for regulated industry production, and integrate Infor with trading partners, suppliers, and enterprise platforms via Infor ION middleware.
use_cases: Automating production from manufacturing operations agents
Managing supply chain from distribution planning agents
Processing clinical materials from health system agents
Scheduling hospitality operations from hotel management agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise ERP complexity
Single-industry companies without Infor's vertical specialization
Organizations without resources for enterprise ERP implementation
best_when: A large enterprise manufacturer, health system, hotel chain, or distribution company wanting AI agents to automate industry-specific ERP operations including production, supply chain, workforce, and financial management in Infor's vertical-specific CloudSuite.
avoid_when: INFOR ION MIDDLEWARE DEPENDENCY: Infor CloudSuite API integrations typically route through Infor ION middleware for cross-application event orchestration; automated integrations that bypass ION for real-time data may miss downstream event triggers in other Infor CloudSuites. INDUSTRY-SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS: Each Infor CloudSuite (Healthcare, Manufacturing, Hospitality) has industry-specific compliance requirements that automated workflows must respect; automated healthcare supply chain workflows must comply with 340B drug pricing program and DEA controlled substance tracking. Koch Industries acquisition strategy risk — Infor was acquired by Koch Industries in 2020; product investment and cloud migration priorities may reflect Koch business interests; verify current API roadmap and CloudSuite investment trajectory before long-term integration commitment. Multi-tenant cloud data isolation — Infor CloudSuite multi-tenant deployments must maintain strict tenant data isolation; automated agents with cross-tenant access are a security configuration risk requiring customer verification.

auth.notes: Infor CloudSuite uses OAuth 2.0 via Infor OS Identity. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Founded 2002 (as SSA Global). Private (Koch Industries, acquired 2020). $3B+ annual revenue. Industry-specific cloud ERP ('Industry Clouds'). 68,000+ customers across manufacturing, healthcare, distribution, hospitality. Infor ION middleware platform. Competes with SAP, Oracle, and Epicor for industry-specific ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; CloudSuite industry-specific pricing; implementation and support services additional
pricing.notes: New York NY. Koch Industries (acquired 2020). Founded 2002. $3B+ revenue. 68,000+ customers. Industry-specific cloud ERP. ION middleware platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth scope; ION event bus throughput limits per tenant; documented per enterprise agreement

known_agent_gotchas: ION MIDDLEWARE REQUIRED FOR CROSS-APPLICATION EVENTS: Automated integrations between Infor CloudSuites (e.g., CloudSuite Healthcare + Infor WFM) must route through Infor ION event bus; direct CloudSuite-to-CloudSuite API calls without ION routing miss downstream event trigger processing and create data consistency failures

CloudSuite-specific API surface — each Infor CloudSuite (Manufacturing, Healthcare, Hospitality, Distribution) has a distinct API surface with different endpoints and data models; API knowledge for one CloudSuite does not transfer to another; document CloudSuite-specific API before building

Koch Industries product investment uncertainty — Infor cloud migration priorities and product investment may have shifted post-Koch acquisition; verify current CloudSuite API roadmap with Infor account team; some on-premise Infor products may have reduced API investment

Healthcare 340B drug pricing compliance — automated healthcare supply chain workflows in Infor CloudSuite Healthcare must correctly apply 340B covered entity drug pricing; incorrect 340B eligibility classification in automated procurement creates HRSA audit and 340B program termination risk

ION event bus retry and idempotency — Infor ION event bus may redeliver events during connectivity interruption; automated event consumers must implement idempotent processing with ION event ID deduplication to prevent duplicate financial or operational transactions

Multi-entity financial consolidation configuration — automated multi-entity financial consolidation in Infor CloudSuite Financials must correctly configure intercompany elimination rules; automated consolidation without proper intercompany configuration creates consolidated financial statement error
agent_readiness.security_notes: Industry cloud ERP. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 via Infor OS. US/EU/APAC/Global. Manufacturing, healthcare, and hospitality enterprise data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Industry ERP. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Enterprise manufacturing and healthcare data.
